what_was_proved: Full Next.js 15 App Router storefront builds cleanly from the Vinyl Pop design system
Variant cart (size × finish × sheet count) with live price updates works end-to-end
Fulfillment state machine (ordered → packed → shipped → delivered) advances and blocks cancel correctly after shipped
Synthetic guest checkout handles success path and card-decline path with correct UX (focus management, aria-live, processing state)
Artist submission flow (upload → curator review → accept/decline → in-drop) is complete
Synthetic cohort (seed=42, 200 users): 13.5% conversion, $12.85 AOV, 7.4% refund rate, no guardrail breach
Variant-clarity iteration applied and verified (price deltas + finish descriptions in picker); no engine regression
design_strengths: Vinyl Pop system travels coherently across all 12 routes — not a theme, a language
True-size badge with mm dimensions solves the core physical sticker purchase anxiety
Post-purchase emotional arc (confirmation → status → cancel copy) maintained brand voice under all stress states
known_gaps_deferred: text-ink-faint contrast ~2.9:1 fails WCAG AA (deferred from QA to next sprint)
No country field in checkout (domestic-only assumption undocumented)
No cart persistence across hard refresh (localStorage-only, intentional for demo scope)
Curator page in production footer nav (should be env-gated on port)
non_claims: does not prove real sticker printing or physical fulfillment
does not prove real artist payment or royalty processing
does not prove production deployment or real payment processing
synthetic cohort only — not real buyer behavior
does not prove full WCAG AA compliance
